mapper.select: SELECT id, document_code, document_type, status, amount, payer, payee, pay_time, has_receipt, receipt_file_name, receipt_file_url, created_at, updated_at FROM payment_documents WHERE document_code = #{documentCode}

SELECT id, document_code, document_type, status, amount, payer, payee, pay_time, has_receipt, receipt_file_name, receipt_file_url, created_at, updated_at FROM payment_documents WHERE document_code IN
#{code}
